title: Keel Toys Plush Bat Soft Toy, 15 cm, Brown
features: DESIGN: Adorable plush bat soft toy featuring brown wings, tan belly, and expressive face details
SIZE: Perfect collectible size measuring 15 centimetres, ideal for both play and display
MATERIAL: Crafted with soft, plush fabric that's gentle to touch and perfect for cuddling
DETAILS: Distinctive wing design with detailed stitching and carefully crafted facial features for character appeal
QUALITY: Made by Keel Toys, known for creating high-quality plush toys with attention to detail
description: Product description Introducing this adorable plush bat from Keel Toys, a charming addition to any soft toy collection. Measuring 15 centimetres, this delightful brown bat features detailed wings, a friendly face with endearing eyes, and a fluffy mane that adds character and charm. The bat's soft, cuddly construction makes it perfect for both play and display. Its manageable size makes it ideal for little hands to hold and carry around, while the quality craftsmanship ensures durability for long-lasting enjoyment. The realistic design captures the unique characteristics of a bat, making it both educational and entertaining. This plush bat is an excellent choice for nature enthusiasts, collectors, or anyone who appreciates adorable stuffed animals. The neutral brown colour scheme and attention to detail make this bat a standout piece that's sure to capture hearts and imaginations. Safety Warning Keep away from naked flame or heat sources.
